AFFECT [[6722609618937832156]]
IMPORT Qt.labs.folderlistmodel [[180923.180922]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
REPLACE [[4129553690040935969]] WITH {
    function ~&4129553690040935969&~()
    {
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&254549367728975064&~.~&486403039092031347&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&6504326343&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&17088436279723538867&~(~&254549367728975064&~.~&478117897681566252&~());
        }
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254549367717124902&~ === 9 && !~&8399340017248501209&~.~&16051300290016870740&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254525455067777027&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&604284659367095156&~(~&8399340017248501209&~.~&8204156355941058436&~(), ~&8399340017248501209&~.~&6102119203847019330&~());
        }
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&8564000837190609446&~.~&9946718343130414977&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254549061334391125&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&8168341223615502881&~(~&8564000837190609446&~.~&6102142810113562074&~());
        }
    }

}
INSERT {
    property ~&6503679477&~ hasCustomPalette : ~&214625660372&~
    ~&7712130752583461&~ {
    ~&5972374&~: paletteController

    property ~&197088788&~ ~&214629676161&~: -1

    function resetToDefault() {
    	hasCustomPalette = ~&214625660372&~;
	rowPaletteTitle.~&214632764553&~ = "rM colors";
	columnPaletteTitle.~&214632764553&~ = "rM colors";
	}

    function nextPalette() {
        ~&214622607920&~ ~&214622615378&~ = paletteFiles.~&214622615378&~;

        ~&5972376&~ (~&214622615378&~ === 0) {
            resetToDefault();
            ~&7083121450889&~;
        }

        ~&214629676161&~++;

        ~&5972376&~ (~&214629676161&~ >= ~&214622615378&~) {
            ~&214629676161&~ = -1;
            resetToDefault();
            ~&7083121450889&~;
        }


	colorPaletteModel.~&7083172477658&~ = paletteFiles.~&197086313&~(~&214629676161&~,"fileUrl");	
	rowPaletteTitle.~&214632764553&~ = colorPaletteModel.~&6503936152&~.~&214642559243&~;
	columnPaletteTitle.~&214632764553&~ = colorPaletteModel.~&6503936152&~.~&214642559243&~;
	hasCustomPalette = ~&6504329801&~;
    }
}

FolderListModel {
        ~&5972374&~: paletteFiles
        ~&7082663378949&~: "file:///home/root/colorPalettes/"
        nameFilters: ["*.qml"]
	showDirs: ~&214625660372&~
}
~&7081645463424&~ {
	~&5972374&~: colorPaletteModel
}

}
TRAVERSE [[425121728314878811.432643201877637292]]:[[254480449992140494]] > [[7712155293725601]]
REPLACE [[214634455770]] WITH{
	~&214634455770&~: hasCustomPalette ? colorPaletteModel.~&6503936152&~ : ~&8399340017248501209&~
}

END TRAVERSE
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[7069700017500842008]]
LOCATE BEFORE [[254480449992140494]]
INSERT {

	    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&13206231600618488452&~ {
		    ~&5972374&~: columnPaletteTitle
                    ~&214632764553&~: "rM colors"
                    ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
		    ~&254494525842443467&~ {
			    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
			    ~&254542236275632405&~: paletteController.nextPalette()
			    ~&383135108587212173&~: paletteController.resetToDefault()
		    }
		}
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[500047409926864674]] > [[14125623155555875541]] > [[425121728314878811.13206231600618488452]][.[[214632764553]]~[[214584656136]]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
INSERT {
	~&5972374&~: rowPaletteTitle 
	~&254494525842443467&~ {
		~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&254542236275632405&~: paletteController.nextPalette()
		~&383135108587212173&~: paletteController.resetToDefault()
	}
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[7060683329257607547]]
REBUILD [[7713561545874130]]
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM | ~&7083121450889&~ ~&197098340&~ === ~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254525455067777027&~ |
REMOVE LOCATED
INSERT {
~&7083121450889&~ (~&197098340&~ >>> 0) === (~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254525455067777027&~ >>> 0)
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
